articles.author: Drew Magary
articles.title: America's gerrymandering crisis, as explained by a reasonable person - SFGATE
articles.description: Republicans are rushing to gerrymander ahead of the midterm elections after the Supreme Court gutted the seminal Voting Rights Act, Drew Magary writes.
articles.content: If you and I could find even the slightest bit of comfort in what has been yet another truly, truly awful year in America, it was that 2026 is an election year. The 2024 election went disastrously, o… [+9379 chars]
